brand.tagline: A single space to track the portfolio, contributions and each member's stake — with the rigor of a fund, at the scale of a circle.
brand.networkVizLabel: Diagram of a network of connected clubs

form.title: Welcome.
form.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link — no password to remember.
form.reassurance: Link valid for 15 min. No password, no spam.

invite.text: First time here? Your club sends you an invitation —

checkEmail.title: Check your inbox
checkEmail.sentTo: We've sent a magic link to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes.

verify.expiredTitle: This link has expired or is invalid.
verify.expiredBody: Request a new one to sign in.

step3.heading: A few agreements before you get started.
step3.rgpdLabel: I accept the privacy policy and the processing of my personal data.
step3.directoryLabel: I agree to appear in the club's member directory.

slide1.title: Your stake
slide1.body: Track how your stake evolves in real time, with the changes and the valuation of your portfolio.

slide2.title: Your club
slide2.body: Find your club's information, view the shared dashboard and stay up to date on decisions.

slide3.title: The network
slide3.body: Connect with members of the Evolve Capital network and build synergies within the community.

invitedWelcome.text: Welcome! Complete your profile to access your space.

error.title: We couldn't load your data. Try again?

empty.description: Your data isn't available yet. The treasurer must first sync the matrix.

sync.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Try again in a few minutes.

detail.title: Your stake
detail.description: It represents {pct} of {clubName}'s portfolio. It evolves with your contributions and the performance of the holdings.

lateAlert.body: Reach out to your club's treasurer to settle your situation.

error.loadTitle: We couldn't load your contributions. Try again?

sync.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Try again in a few minutes.

timeline.emptyDescription: Your first contribution will appear here.

admin.staleData: Couldn't refresh the data. Showing the last known values.

forbidden.description: This area is reserved for club treasurers.

syncError.rateLimited: Rate limit reached. Try again in a few minutes.

members.sortLabel: Sort by {column}{direction, select, asc {, ascending} desc {, descending} other {}}

lockModal.title: Lock access for {name}?
lockModal.description: This person will be signed out immediately and won't be able to access the member area until unlocked. This action is reversible.

unlockModal.title: Unlock access for {name}?
unlockModal.description: The member will be able to access the member area again.

empty.title: No contributions
empty.description: No payment recorded for this filter.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Invite new members to the club. Each access link is personal and expires automatically.

form.note: A link valid for 72 h will be sent to this address.
form.success: Invitation created. Copy the access link below.
form.errorDuplicate: An invitation is already pending for this email.

empty.title: No invitations.
empty.description: Invite your first member to get started.

invitations.linkLabel: Access link (share it with the member)
invitations.linkNote: Automatic email delivery is coming soon.

auth.title: We couldn't load the sign-in. Try again?
auth.body: No worries, your account is safe.

onboarding.body: Your progress is saved, you can pick up right where you left off.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist or has been moved. No worries, we'll bring you back to familiar ground.

accessSuspended.title: Your access has been suspended.
accessSuspended.description: Your treasurer has temporarily suspended your access to the member area. This may be due to an outstanding contribution or another reason. Contact them to learn more and restore your access.
